parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  callId: data.callId,
  phone: data.phone,
  callDurationSeconds: data.callDurationSeconds,
  callStartedAt: data.callStartedAt,
  score_company_size: 1,
  score_tech_stack: 1,
  score_pain_point: 1,
  score_timeline: 1,
  conversation_summary: 'Kein Transkript verfügbar.',
  sentiment: 'neutral',
  objections_raised: [],
  drop_off_point: null,
  is_decision_maker: false,
  status: 'contacted',
  next_steps: [],
  transcript: ''
} }];

const d = $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  callId: d.callId,
  score_company_size: d.score_company_size,
  score_tech_stack: d.score_tech_stack,
  score_pain_point: d.score_pain_point,
  score_timeline: d.score_timeline,
  conversation_summary: d.conversation_summary || '',
  sentiment: d.sentiment || 'neutral',
  objections_raised: Array.isArray(d.objections_raised) ? d.objections_raised : [],
  drop_off_point: d.drop_off_point || null,
  is_decision_maker: Boolean(d.is_decision_maker),
  status: d.status || 'contacted',
  next_steps: Array.isArray(d.next_steps) ? d.next_steps : [],
  transcript: d.transcript || '',
  callDurationSeconds: d.callDurationSeconds || null,
  callStartedAt: d.callStartedAt || null,
  phone: d.phone || null
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (
  call_id, score_company_size, score_tech_stack, score_pain_point, score_timeline,
  transcript, conversation_summary, sentiment,
  objections_raised, drop_off_point,
  call_duration_seconds, call_started_at,
  is_decision_maker, status, next_steps, phone
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5,
  $6, $7, $8,
  $9::text[], $10,
  $11, $12::timestamptz,
  $13, $14, $15::text[], $16
)
ON CONFLICT (call_id) DO UPDATE SET
  score_company_size = EXCLUDED.score_company_size,
  score_tech_stack = EXCLUDED.score_tech_stack,
  score_pain_point = EXCLUDED.score_pain_point,
  score_timeline = EXCLUDED.score_timeline,
  transcript = EXCLUDED.transcript,
  conversation_summary = EXCLUDED.conversation_summary,
  sentiment = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  objections_raised = EXCLUDED.objections_raised,
  drop_off_point = CASE
    WHEN leads.appointment_booked = true THEN null
    ELSE EXCLUDED.drop_off_point
  END,
  call_duration_seconds = EXCLUDED.call_duration_seconds,
  call_started_at = EXCLUDED.call_started_at,
  is_decision_maker = EXCLUDED.is_decision_maker,
  status = CASE
    WHEN leads.appointment_booked = true AND leads.status = 'appointment_booked'
    THEN leads.status
    ELSE EXCLUDED.status
  END,
  next_steps = EXCLUDED.next_steps,
  phone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, leads.phone)

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  callId: data.callId,
  phone: data.phone,
  callDurationSeconds: data.callDurationSeconds,
  callStartedAt: data.callStartedAt,
  score_company_size: 1,
  score_tech_stack: 1,
  score_pain_point: 1,
  score_timeline: 1,
  conversation_summary: 'Kein Transkript verfügbar.',
  sentiment: 'neutral',
  objections_raised: [],
  drop_off_point: null,
  is_decision_maker: false,
  status: 'contacted',
  next_steps: [],
  transcript: ''
} }];

const d = $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  callId: d.callId,
  score_company_size: d.score_company_size,
  score_tech_stack: d.score_tech_stack,
  score_pain_point: d.score_pain_point,
  score_timeline: d.score_timeline,
  conversation_summary: d.conversation_summary || '',
  sentiment: d.sentiment || 'neutral',
  objections_raised: Array.isArray(d.objections_raised) ? d.objections_raised : [],
  drop_off_point: d.drop_off_point || null,
  is_decision_maker: Boolean(d.is_decision_maker),
  status: d.status || 'contacted',
  next_steps: Array.isArray(d.next_steps) ? d.next_steps : [],
  transcript: d.transcript || '',
  callDurationSeconds: d.callDurationSeconds || null,
  callStartedAt: d.callStartedAt || null,
  phone: d.phone || null
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (

  $11, $12::timestamptz,
  $13, $14, $15::text[], $16

ON CONFLICT (call_id) DO UPDATE SET
  score_company_size = EXCLUDED.score_company_size,
  score_tech_stack = EXCLUDED.score_tech_stack,
  score_pain_point = EXCLUDED.score_pain_point,

  call_duration_seconds = EXCLUDED.call_duration_seconds,
